name: gazebo-mcp
description: Gazebo robotics simulation bridge to fleet mesh — control robots, sync scenes, export CAD.

tools.name: gz_topic_pub
tools.description: Publish to a Gazebo simulation topic

tools.name: gz_sim_state
tools.description: List models in the Gazebo simulation

tools.name: sync_to_yahboom
tools.description: Push Gazebo robot command to physical Yahboom

tools.name: sync_to_resonite
tools.description: Spawn Gazebo models in Resonite VR

tools.name: fleet_sync_all
tools.description: Broadcast to all connected fleet repos
